privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.info_desc: JSON Tool Pro is a pure frontend application. Your JSON data is processed entirely in your browser and is never sent to any server. We do not collect or store your personal data or the JSON content you work with.
privacy.cookies_desc: We may use essential cookies to ensure the site functions properly. No tracking cookies are used without your consent. If Google AdSense is enabled, Google may use cookies for ad personalization. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.third_party_desc: This site may use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google may collect certain information (such as your IP address and browser type) to serve relevant ads. For more details, please see Google's Privacy Policy.
privacy.ads_desc: We use Google AdSense to display ads. Google uses cookies to serve ads based on your previous visits to this site or other websites.
privacy.ads_optout: You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google's Ad Settings: https://adssettings.google.com
privacy.contact_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.response: We will respond to your inquiry as soon as possible.
